response.step_by_step_log:
1.  The video was analyzed to determine the songs being performed.
2.  The on-screen text in the top-left corner identified the songs: "ビターチョコデコレーション" (Bitter Choco Decoration) at 00:00 and "Deal with the devil" at 03:07.
3.  The performer was identified as Aki Rosenthal.
4.  The original artists were identified as "syudou" for "Bitter Choco Decoration" and "Tia" for "Deal with the devil".
5.  Search queries were constructed: '"Bitter Choco Decoration" syudou Japanese and English lyrics' and '"Deal with the devil" Tia Japanese and English lyrics'.
6.  The lyric search results were reviewed, and appropriate full-length lyrics were compiled for the JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual idol, Aki Rosenthal, performing a two-song medley. The first song is "Bitter Choco Decoration" by syudou, and the second song is "Deal with the devil" by Tia. Both performances occur on a virtual stage.

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performs "Bitter Choco Decoration" on a virtual stage with purple lighting and dice/cards props. Song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
人を信用しないように
人を愛さないように
期待しないように
その一方で、嫌われないように
偉そうにしないように
反感を買わないように
冗談を言って、愛想を振りまいて
都合よく笑って
ビターチョコデコレーション
全部食べて、黙ってろ
ビターチョコデコレーション
孤独な愛は汚れる
ビターチョコデコレーション
明日もその先も
地獄は続く
あぁ、だからさ、今は
何も考えずに二人でいようよ
あぁ、思い出した！
君、あの時、真面目な顔してたな、いや、なんでもない
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I do my best not to trust people too much
Not to love anyone, not to expect too much
On the other hand, I try not to cause offense
Not to act all haughty, not to draw in any hate
I also mustn't forget to throw in a light joke
And some smooth talk here and there
And to always smile and please everybody
Bitter chocolate decoration
Just eat it all, and don't say a word
Bitter chocolate decoration
Sometimes, lonely love makes you dirty
Bitter chocolate decoration
Surely tomorrow and beyond
Hell will continue endlessly
Ah, that's why, please, just for now
Let's do it together without any pretense
Ah, I remembered! You, at that time
Looking so serious, no, never mind

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal transitions to performing "Deal with the devil" on a virtual stage, with a new outfit and backup dancers. Song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
One, two, one
アップダウンは世の常
クズ引いたって動じない
肝心なの Strong な Mind
出し抜いて Survive
行きつく先は Heaven or hell
この世の...
Deal with the devil
見透かして
裏返して　あたしのモノにする
あんたの髪の一本まで全部
A million dollars, I'd say raise
さあ come on 覚悟決めて
震えたかぶれ my heart
虚勢でしょそれ You doubt me
読み切って レッツ Showdown
Deal with the devil
見逃さない
どんな小さなズルだって
あたしの目はごまかされないわ

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
One, two, one
Rising and falling is pretty normal in this world
Even if I draw a bad hand, I won't let it show
It's very important to have a strong mind
Outsmart them, survive
Where we end up is heaven or hell
This world...
Deal with the devil
I see right through
Flip the cards, I wanna see your fate
When I see that you're officially my little puppet
A million dollars, I'd say we raise
Come on, prepare yourself and tremble with my heart
It's just a bluff, isn't it? You doubt me
Read it, let's showdown
Deal with the devil
I won't miss even the smallest cheat
My eyes won't be deceived
A million dollars, I'd say raise
I'll love the winner to the bone
